# Sonde LLM Index

Canonical documentation source: `apps/web/content/docs`

## Primary pages
- `/docs` - overview and navigation
- `/docs/quickstart` - first run path
- `/docs/cli-reference` - full CLI contract
- `/docs/cli-serve-protocol` - JSON line protocol for `sonde serve`
- `/docs/scoring-100-guide` - reproducible path to score 100/100
- `/docs/troubleshooting` - failures and fixes
- `/docs/glossary` - canonical terminology

## Concepts
- `/docs/sonde` - STM model overview
- `/docs/sondage-manifest` - manifest generation and lifecycle
- `/docs/architecture` - package boundaries and data flow
- `/docs/examples` - command workflows

## Repository entrypoints
- `/README.md` - human-friendly top-level overview linking to canonical docs
- `/packages/sonde-cli/README.md` - package-level CLI entrypoint linking to canonical docs

## Notes for agents
- Treat `/docs/cli-reference` as authoritative for command syntax and behavior.
- Treat `/docs/cli-serve-protocol` as authoritative for serve request/response shapes.
- Prefer JSON examples and edge-case sections when generating integrations and tests.
